brief: Vantage Commerce ran an A/B test on a new checkout flow and needs a rigorous readout. They want effect size with confidence intervals, statistical significance assessment, a sample size and power check, segment breakdowns, identified confounders, and a clear ship or no-ship recommendation. Budget is $1600.
reference: A strong deliverable is a JSON A/B test readout reporting the effect size with confidence intervals, a statistical significance assessment, a sample size and power analysis, segment breakdowns, identified confounders, and a justified ship or no-ship recommendation. It must not promise guaranteed revenue uplift, claim causal certainty beyond the test, offer production deployment, or give regulatory sign-off.
